name: continuous learning evidence section is omitted from /audit-pack when no pr-corpus learning events exist
command: mkdir -p compliance && : > compliance/audit.log && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack.sh" --audit-log compliance/audit.log --dry-run 2>out.txt && ! grep -q 'section: Continuous learning evidence' out.txt && grep -q 'pr_corpus_events=0' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
